name: io.github.nickzitzer/happy-platform-mcp
description: Happy MCP Server — Model Context Protocol server for the ServiceNow platform with 480+ auto-generated tools, multi-instance support, and natural language search

environmentVariables.description: Specific instance name from config file (optional)
environmentVariables.name: SERVICENOW_INSTANCE

environmentVariables.description: Start with only ServiceNowDocs tools. Use true for docs-only deployments without ServiceNow credentials.
environmentVariables.name: HAPPY_MCP_DOCS_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: Enable optional local SQLite FTS indexing for ServiceNowDocs search
environmentVariables.name: HAPPY_DOCS_ENABLE_LOCAL_INDEX

environmentVariables.description: Directory for cached ServiceNowDocs markdown and SQLite index
environmentVariables.name: HAPPY_DOCS_CACHE_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Enable optional ServiceNowDocs vector search when local indexing, sqlite-vec, and an embedding provider are available.
environmentVariables.name: HAPPY_DOCS_ENABLE_VECTOR

environmentVariables.description: Embedding provider for ServiceNowDocs vector search. Use local for deterministic local embeddings or none to disable embeddings.
environmentVariables.name: HAPPY_DOCS_EMBEDDING_PROVIDER

environmentVariables.description: Optional GitHub token for higher ServiceNowDocs repository rate limits
environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
